name: 03_triggered_overrides_armed_conditions
description: Branch 1 (is_triggered=True): even when all inner conditions WOULD fire System A and System B if not triggered, the triggered guard takes absolute precedence.
derivation: Inner gate AND both inner conditions WOULD fire if not triggered: weight 0.8 > 0.5 AND diff -0.4 < 0 (gate pass); System A: safe_hwm 3.0 >= cross 2.0 AND current_return -2.0 < safe_hwm 3.0 (would increment ticks to 3 -> would set is_vwap_broken True); System B: current_return -2.0 <= bleed_arm -1.0 (would increment bleed_ticks to 3 -> would set is_vwap_bleed_broken True). BUT is_triggered=True -> all skipped. Counters preserved at (2, 2). Both broken stay False. Returns (2, 2, False, False). Catches an impl that omitted the triggered guard.
